Double-click to show.
A jade runestone. It glows in your hands.
A jotun weapons specialist in the Bitterfrost Frontier will combine multiple fragments into exotic weapons.
A juicy fruit from a faraway land.
A key aspect of golemancy is rebuilding your golem when it breaks down. The Arcane Council of Rata Sum strongly encourages its citizens practice this virtue in a quick and efficient manner.

A large case containing piles of silky sand gathered from the Maguuma Wastes.
A large hunk of meat. Chef Mestergruff of Mennerheim might want this.

A leftover claw from a gargoyle of some variety.
A lesser vision crystal imbued with ectoplasm, used to interact with dormant souls.
A Lesson in Flying

A letter from Anette Eymundrdottir located at in Jora's Keep. She wants your help crafting Ancient Boreal weapons.

Double-click to locate.
A letter from Drojkor asking you to come see him back at the Djinn Enclave.
A letter from Unja asking you to visit her at the springer stable at Highjump Ranch.
A little light of love and hope. <c=@Flavor>Proceeds donated to Extra Life!</c>
A local and beautifully scented flower with various uses. The Inquest expansion has made this plant a rare find, and Hafren is collecting them for their preservation.
A local described seeing a small fracture-like portal north of Captain's Retreat.
A long buried stone relic. Priory Explorer Leandra is searching for such relics.

A massive pile of ectoplasm. Double-click to break into 50 normal-sized pieces.
A massive pile of ectoplasm. Double-click to break into 500 normal-sized pieces.
A massive tusk from a powerful boar. This will make a worthy trophy.
A message from Researcher Yarixx, who has developed a powerful new system that harnesses spirit essence, inspired by the Spirits of the Wild.
A missing belonging found inside a rift in the Mists.
A mission statement of dredge freedom.
A missive from Skimmer Trainer Ardra containing information on troop movements. Intended for delivery to Healer Ebele north of Arid Gladefields. Can be consumed for Mastery experience and karma.
A mud-stained note that appears to be from a journal. Some bits are still legible. This item only has value as part of a collection.
A mysteriously light and well-balanced weapon that seems malleable to your wishes. Double-click to choose what form it should take.

Gives bonus Mastery experience once per day.

A package of seeds used by the Sylvari to grow their plantlike architecture.

A purified scale of Jormag. Once acquired, you can begin harvesting Fragmented Elder Dragon Memories when you complete events in Frostgorge Sound, Bitterfrost Frontier, Bjora Marches, Drizzlewood Coast, and Icebrood Dragon Response Missions.

A purified scale of Primordus. Once acquired, you can begin harvesting fragmented Elder Dragon memories when you complete events in Ember Bay, Draconis Mons, and in Destroyer Dragon Response Missions.
A purified scale of Soo-Won. Once acquired, you can begin harvesting Fragmented Elder Dragon Memories when you complete events in the Cantha region.
A purified scale of Zhaitan. Once acquired, you can begin harvesting Fragmented Elder Dragon Memories when you complete events in Orrian maps and defeat Tequatl the Sunless.
